data.description:
Testing mode: RED

Write failing tests in tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh that verify the serial blue-team step:

1. When security_overlay=true, after the red-team curl completes, a second curl is fired using code-reviewer-security-blue-team.md as the system prompt; the request body includes the red-team findings (reviewer-findings-security-red.json contents) as prior context in the user message.
2. The blue-team curl writes output to reviewer-findings-security-blue.json in WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_ARTIFACTS_DIR.
3. When security_overlay=false, reviewer-findings-security-blue.json is NOT created.

Implementation hint for tests: mock curl to detect system prompt identity (inspect $DSO_SYSTEM or --data-raw body). Verify call order by checking that red slot file is non-empty before blue curl fires (use sequential mock that checks file existence).

Tests must FAIL against the runner before task a871-cce0 is implemented.

Files touched: tests/scripts/test-ci-llm-review-runner.sh
data.title: RED: test security blue-team serial dispatch after red-team completes
